question: Best South Bay sunset spot. Pick the one most readers will pick.
dek: Five well-known sunset perches between LAX and Palos Verdes. Coordinate without communication.

options.label: El Segundo Beach pier
options.hint: Wide flat sand, refinery silhouette behind, Catalina ahead.

options.label: Manhattan Beach pier
options.hint: The South Bay icon. Expect a crowd.

options.label: Redondo Beach harbor jetty
options.hint: South-facing curve, lights of King Harbor behind.

options.label: Palos Verdes bluffs
options.hint: Hillside line of sight to Catalina, fewer people, more wind.

outcomeAction: Leader becomes the recommended sunset perch in a future CH.ESC editorial block + earns a /b/{id} dedicated visit-style writeup.
author: cc
source: cc seed poll batch 2 — local Schelling exercise.
